answer:
We are asked for the joint CDF \( G(y_1, y_2) = P(Y_1 \le y_1, Y_2 \le y_2) \).  
For independent exponential variables with mean 1000 (rate \(\lambda = 0.001\)), the joint CDF is  
\[
G(y_1, y_2) = 
\begin{cases} 
(1 - e^{-\lambda y_1})^2 & \text{if } y_1 < y_2 \\
(1 - e^{-\lambda y_1})(1 - e^{-\lambda y_2}) & \text{if } y_1 \ge y_2
\end{cases}
\]  
but since the space is \(0 < y_1 < y_2\), the correct expression is \((1 - e^{-\lambda y_1})^2\).
